title: Stephan Martiniere

'''Stephan Martiniere''' is an artist and provided concept art for [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']] and [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']]. He also drew "[[The Fourth Precept]]" in ''[[Star Wars: Visionaries]]''.{{Mediacat|imagecat=images by Stephan Martiniere}}

==Sources==
*''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith]]''
